english translation text:
Ziyarat Imam Hussain (AS)
On Arafat Day
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Allah is the Most Great of all.
All praise be to Allah very much.
Glory be to Allah in mornings and evenings.
All praise be to Allah Who has guided us to this.

arabic text: وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلاَ أَنْ هَدَانَا ٱللَّهُ
english translation text: We would not have been guided if Allah had not guided us.
The messengers of our Lord have indeed come with the truth.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon the Messenger of Allah, peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
Peace be upon the Commander of the Faithful.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon Fatimah the luminous and the doyenne of all women of the world.
Peace be upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn.
Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad.
Peace be upon Musa the son of Ja`far.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of Musa.
Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of Muhammad.
Peace be upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon the virtuous Successor and Awaited.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.
I—the servant of you and the son of your servant and your bondwoman,
who is loyal to those who are loyal to you
and enemy of those who are your enemies—
am seeking the shelter of your shrine
and seeking nearness to Allah through directing to you.
All praise be to Allah Who guided me to be loyal to you,
Who conferred upon me with my visiting you,
and Who made easy for me to direct to you.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the chosen by Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the friend of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the most beloved by Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Fatimah the luminous.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا بْنَ محَمَّدٍ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Muhammad the well-chosen prophet.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of `Ali the well-pleased.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the luminous.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَدِيـجَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Khadijah the grand lady.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah and son of His vengeance
and the unavenged sanctity.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rates,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
and obeyed Allah until death came upon you.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
english translation text: May Allah curse the people who were informed about that but they approved it.

arabic text: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: O my master! O Abu-`Abdullah!
I call Allah, His angels,
His Prophets, and His Messengers
to witness that I believe in you and in your Return
and I have faith in the laws of my religion and in the sealing deeds of mine,
and in my final return to my Lord.
Allah’s blessings be upon you all,
upon your souls, upon your bodies,
upon the present and the absent (of your group),
and upon the manifest and the hidden (of your affairs).

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of the Seal of Prophets,
son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors,
son of the leader of the pious,

arabic text: وَٱبْنَ قَائِدِ ٱلْغُرِّ ٱلْمُحَجَّلِينَ إِلَىٰ جَنَّاتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
english translation text: and son of the white-forehead, marked believers.
How can that you be anything other than this
while you are the door to the true guidance,
the guide to piety,
the firmest handle,
the argument against the inhabitants of this world,
and the fifth of the People of the Cloak.
You were nourished by the hand of mercy,
breast-fed by the bosom of faith,
and brought up in the lap of Islam.
So, my soul is definitely displeased by the way you left this world
and it has no doubt that you are alive.
Allah’s blessings be upon you,
your ascendants, and your descendants.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَرِيعَ ٱلْعَبْرَةِ ٱلسَّاكِبَةِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O object of the pouring tears
and match of the astounding misfortune.

arabic text: لَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
english translation text: May Allah curse the people who violated your sanctities
and infringed the holiness of Islam.
So, you—may Allah’s blessings be upon you—were killed overwhelmed,

arabic text: وَأَصْبَحَ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ بِكَ مَوْتُوراً
english translation text: the Messenger of Allah, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household, became cut off because of loss of you,
and the Book of Allah became deserted due to losing you.
Peace be upon you, your grandfather, your father,
your mother, your brother,
the Imams from your descendants,
those who were martyred with you,
and the angels who are surrounding your tomb,
witnessing for your visitors,
and praying for the acceptance of the prayers of your adherents.
Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

arabic text: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

arabic text: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.
So unbearable is the misfortune
and so horrendous is the calamity of you

arabic text: عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ
english translation text: for us and for all the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.
May Allah curse the people who put saddles and reins on their animals
and readied themselves for fighting against you.

arabic text: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: O my master! O Abu-`Abdullah!
I have directed to your sanctuary
and I have come to your shrine

arabic text: أَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ بِٱلشَّأْنِ ٱلَّذِي لَكَ عِنْدَهُ
english translation text: asking Almighty Allah in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
and in the name of the position that you occupy with him

arabic text: أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

arabic text: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
english translation text: and to include me with your group in this world and in the Hereafter,
out of His favor, magnanimity, and generosity

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
